input.settingPrompt: A damp lower level of an old keep repurposed as a prison; the warden sleeps near the cells he guards.

keyLocations.name: Cell Block
keyLocations.description: A row of iron-barred holding cells.

keyLocations.name: Guard Stair
keyLocations.description: The spiral stair up to the gatehouse.

identity.characteristics: A cramped stone room with a single barred window, a low ceiling, and a faint smell of tallow and damp.

floor.texture: cold, uneven slabs with damp gathering in the cracks

back.texture: a single iron-barred window set high in the centre, mortar crumbling

front.texture: a heavy iron-banded door set in the centre

left.texture: bare and mortar-grey, streaked with damp

right.texture: blotched with pale saltpetre and mildew

objects.name: iron-framed cot
objects.description: A narrow, hard cot with a thin straw mattress, sized for one tired man.

objects.name: rough nightstand
objects.description: A small squat nightstand of dark, water-stained wood.

objects.name: oil lamp
objects.description: A small brass oil lamp with a smoke-blackened glass, kept close at hand.

objects.name: threadbare rug
objects.description: A worn rectangular rug, its pattern long since trodden away.

objects.name: faded portrait
objects.description: A small framed portrait of a stern ancestor, hung for company more than beauty.

objects.name: footlocker chest
objects.description: A banded wooden chest holding the warden's spare effects.

arrangementProse: The iron-framed cot is pushed lengthwise against the back wall, leaving as much floor as the small cell allows. The rough nightstand stands tight against the head of the cot on its right, near enough to reach without rising, and the oil lamp sits squarely on top of the nightstand. Above the nightstand the faded portrait hangs on the back wall, a little above head height when seated. At the foot of the cot crouches the banded footlocker chest, snug against the bed's end. The threadbare rug lies in the open center of the floor, its near edge slipping under the foot of the cot.

placementNotes.note: Tight against the head (right end) of the cot.
Resting on top of the nightstand.
Centered on the open floor; near edge tucks under the foot of the cot.
Hung on the back wall above the nightstand.
At the foot of the cot, snug against its end.
